The '''''Sicorro''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] under the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. She arrived at [[Depot XLS]] for repairs but was also attacked by [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Behind the scenes==
Whether or not ''Sicorro'' gets destroyed depends on the player's actions.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
